untranslatable_reason: Not a sizing rule. This is a data validation and risk management protocol (pre-trade filter). It describes entry conditions and validation requirements, not how to size positions. Position sizing rules specify *how much* to risk/allocate per trade; this rule specifies *when* it is safe to trade based on data quality. Should be extracted as a FILTER/ENTRY_CONDITION in standard DSL, not as POSITION_SIZING.
